seoTitle: Narngulu vs Narra Tarra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narngulu and Narra Tarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Narngulu vs Narra Tarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narngulu and Narra Tarra.
heading: Narngulu vs Narra Tarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narngulu, Western Australia and Narra Tarra, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narngulu has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Narra Tarra (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narngulu or Narra Tarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narngulu has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Narra Tarra scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narngulu scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Narra Tarra scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narngulu or Narra Tarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narngulu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
